question: Write a C++ program that asks the user to enter an integer between 1 and 7, and then uses a switch statement to print the corresponding day of the week (e.g., 1 for Monday, 2 for Tuesday, etc.). Handle invalid input.

test_cases.expected: Enter an integer between 1 and 7 (1 for Monday, 7 for Sunday): Monday
Enter an integer between 1 and 7 (1 for Monday, 7 for Sunday): Sunday

Enter an integer between 1 and 7 (1 for Monday, 7 for Sunday): Invalid input. The number must be between 1 and 7.
Enter an integer between 1 and 7 (1 for Monday, 7 for Sunday): Tuesday

Enter an integer between 1 and 7 (1 for Monday, 7 for Sunday): Invalid input. The number must be between 1 and 7.
Enter an integer between 1 and 7 (1 for Monday, 7 for Sunday): Saturday

Enter an integer between 1 and 7 (1 for Monday, 7 for Sunday): Invalid input. Please enter a numerical value.
Enter an integer between 1 and 7 (1 for Monday, 7 for Sunday): Wednesday

Enter an integer between 1 and 7 (1 for Monday, 7 for Sunday): Invalid input. Please enter a numerical value.
Enter an integer between 1 and 7 (1 for Monday, 7 for Sunday): Friday
